name: Team Russ
subject: FWD: Scott Walker: "Do Right by Ron"
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Scott Walker has made it his number one priority to defeat Russ. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **"With majority control of the United States Senate at stake, Wisconsin's United States Senate seat could tip the balance."
\- Scott Walker, October 30, 2016** Scott Walker just sent this in an email below to Senator Ron Johnson's supporters. And he's absolutely right: The path to control of the Senate -- and the Supreme Court -- starts in Wisconsin. Scott Walker has said it's his number one priority to defeat Russ and dismantle everything we've worked so hard to build together during this campaign. With the latest news that billionaire Diane Hendricks just gave Sen. Johnson's super PAC $5 million dollars of last-minute cash, we have to work harder than ever. [**We have to fight back: And that means hitting our FINAL end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow. Chip in $5 to help us get there.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543781/3237729176/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Scott Walker
Date: Sun, Oct 30, 2016
Subject: Do Right by Ron
Friend,
_**With majority control of the United States Senate at stake, Wisconsin's United States Senate seat could tip the balance.**_
And my friend Ron Johnson urgently needs your help to win.
Ron is climbing in the polls. He is tied with Senator Russ Feingold. And the momentum is ours.
But with _**reports that Hillary Clinton and her allies will invest millions to take over the Senate, we need to be ready for anything.**_ And the outcome of this race could very well hinge on your immediate action.
Will you make an online contribution right now to help Ron win and ensure we keep the Senate in GOP control?
[**> > CHIP IN $10**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[**> > CHIP IN $35**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[**> > CHIP IN $50**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[**> > CHIP IN $100**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[**> > CHIP IN $250**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[**> > CHIP IN some other amount**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
Ron Johnson is a manufacturer, a conservative reformer, and an outsider to Washington. He sees a problem and he fixes it.
Russ Feingold is a career politician, a liberal Democrat, and a Washington insider. He sees a problem, starts a new Big Government program, and makes it worse.
Wisconsin can't afford another six years of Russ Feingold, and America can't afford a Democrat Senate.
Here is the good news: Ron Johnson WILL win if you help him. In the final days of this neck-and-neck and too-close-to-call race, [**please make your decisive, high impact, high speed contribution immediately to ensure that Ron is elected and that the GOP keeps control of the United States Senate.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
I know Ron and our Republican team can count on you.
Scott Walker
P.S. We WILL win this race but we must act [**NOW**.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467f/1c469400/1cf1000/3543780/3237729176/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-30_eom_10-nd&utm_campaign=eom&utm_medium=ema")

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: PETITION: Hillary Clinton needs to oppose fracking pipeline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Police stormed the Native encampment in the path of the Dakota Access pipeline and arrested more than 100 people trying to stop this pipeline's threat to water sources and climate change. **There's only one person who has the power to stop this pipeline from being built: Hillary Clinton.** If she says she totally opposes the pipeline, it won't be built.
[**Add your name to our petition calling on Hillary Clinton to oppose the Dakota Access pipeline.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030")
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HILLARY CLINTON](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030")**
Sisters and Brothers,
The Dakota Access pipeline would carry some of the dirtiest oil on the planet across four states, putting at risk farms, native land, critical water sources, and our flight against climate change.
Tens of thousands of members of Our Revolution have stood up to oppose the construction of the pipeline, and you've helped contribute tens of thousands of dollars to the Standing Rock Sioux tribe leading the fight against the pipeline in North Dakota.
But this week things took a turn for the worse. **Police armed in military gear stormed the occupation, arresting more than 100 Native activists, journalists, and others there in solidarity, and destroyed the Native encampment in the path of the pipeline.**
This is an unacceptable escalation with the explicit goal of allowing a corporation to profit off of the continued destruction of our planet. And so we must escalate as well.
There is one person who will have the power to stop the Dakota Access Pipeline: Secretary Hillary Clinton. If she is to be our next president, she will have the power to stop the pipeline. And our best opportunity to get her to oppose it is before the election.
[**Please add your name to our petition calling on Hillary Clinton to say she opposes the Dakota Access pipeline, and asking her to cancel its construction if she is the next president.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030")
Native American youth held an action in the lobby of Secretary Clinton's campaign headquarters asking her to oppose the pipeline. They delivered a letter from the tribes involved, and the response from Secretary Clinton's campaign was thoroughly disappointing.
Clinton's campaign said:
> "We received a letter today from representatives of the tribes protesting the construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. From the beginning of this campaign, Secretary Clinton has been clear that she thinks all voices should be heard and all views considered in federal infrastructure projects. Now, all of the parties involved--including the federal government, the pipeline company and contractors, the state of North Dakota, and the tribes--need to find a path forward that serves the broadest public interest. As that happens, it's important that on the ground in North Dakota, everyone respects demonstrators' rights to protest peacefully, and workers' rights to do their jobs safely."
This is the complete wrong way to consider what's happening with this pipeline. The pipeline would carry millions of gallons of fracked oil. It threatens to poison the Standing Rock Sioux's source of water. It would threaten farmers' livelihood. It is a huge threat to climate change.
The only path forward should be cancelling the pipeline. Period.
We think that if hundreds of thousands of people call on Hillary Clinton to oppose the pipeline as soon as possible, we can secure a commitment to have the pipeline canceled if she's president. But our best chance is before the election. That's why it is so important to take action now.
[**The window is closing for us to get Hillary Clinton to oppose the Dakota Access pipeline. Add your name to our petition now asking her to promise to cancel the pipeline, and we'll deliver your signature to her campaign.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030")
We can stop this pipeline if all of us stand together. Thank you for supporting Native tribes, farmers, and everyone trying to save our planet.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Our Revolution
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HILLARY CLINTON](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161030")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

There's only one person who has the power to stop this pipeline from being built: Hillary Clinton. If she says she totally opposes the pipeline, it won't be built. "" "" Sisters and Brothers, The Dakota Access pipeline would carry some of the dirtiest oil on the planet across four states, putting at risk farms, native land, critical water sources, and our flight against climate change. Tens of thousands of members of Our Revolution have stood up to oppose the construction of the pipeline, and you've helped contribute tens of thousands of dollars to the Standing Rock Sioux tribe leading the fight against the pipeline in North Dakota. But this week things took a turn for the worse. Police armed in military gear stormed the occupation, arresting more than 100 Native activists, journalists, and others there in solidarity, and destroyed the Native encampment in the path of the pipeline. This is an unacceptable escalation with the explicit goal of allowing a corporation to profit off of the continued destruction of our planet. And so we must escalate as well. There is one person who will have the power to stop the Dakota Access Pipeline: Secretary Hillary Clinton. If she is to be our next president, she will have the power to stop the pipeline. And our best opportunity to get her to oppose it is before the election. "" Native American youth held an action in the lobby of Secretary Clinton's campaign headquarters asking her to oppose the pipeline. They delivered a letter from the tribes involved, and the response from Secretary Clinton's campaign was thoroughly disappointing. Clinton's campaign said: "We received a letter today from representatives of the tribes protesting the construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. From the beginning of this campaign, Secretary Clinton has been clear that she thinks all voices should be heard and all views considered in federal infrastructure projects. Now, all of the parties involved--including the federal government, the pipeline company and contractors, the state of North Dakota, and the tribes--need to find a path forward that serves the broadest public interest. As that happens, it's important that on the ground in North Dakota, everyone respects demonstrators' rights to protest peacefully, and workers' rights to do their jobs safely." This is the complete wrong way to consider what's happening with this pipeline. The pipeline would carry millions of gallons of fracked oil. It threatens to poison the Standing Rock Sioux's source of water. It would threaten farmers' livelihood. It is a huge threat to climate change. The only path forward should be cancelling the pipeline. Period. We think that if hundreds of thousands of people call on Hillary Clinton to oppose the pipeline as soon as possible, we can secure a commitment to have the pipeline canceled if she's president. But our best chance is before the election. That's why it is so important to take action now. "" We can stop this pipeline if all of us stand together. Thank you for supporting Native tribes, farmers, and everyone trying to save our planet. In solidarity, Shannon Jackson Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

| | Hi there,

I've been through a lot of election days and I can tell you: You don't want to wake up on November 9th to a Republican-controlled Senate, the same old Tea Partiers in the House, or a President Trump and wish you'd done more.

If we give this everything we've got, we'll wake up celebrating our first woman president, a Democratic Senate, AND new voices in the House.

I'm incredibly grateful that so many members of this community have stepped up this cycle to invest in our races. Every donation allows us to do more to support our candidates.

Today, I'm asking you to make sure we all finish out this election with no doubts and no regrets.

**Rush a donation before midnight tomorrow -- of whatever you can -- to help hit our final End-of-Month goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Hit-Octobers-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7433/24c69fd9/9fab65b/18eda949/3823648338/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161028_email_OctoberGoal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpHitOctobersG&utm_campaign=WPEFEV89N_digital_email_20161030_FOMO_n-all&source=WPEFEV89N_digital_email_20161030_FOMO_n-all")**

name: Eric Trump
subject: My father's committed Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Help my father finish strong and WIN on Tuesday, November 8. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454459:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)
Peter,

Know what's scarier than Halloween? Hillary Clinton as our next President.

**And I hate to alarm you, but we're running out of time.**

She's pulling out all her dirty tricks Peter, flooding the airways with negative ads about my father and anything else she can throw at him. Why? Because she knows when it comes to the issues, my father's plans and ideas are better than hers, hands down.

__We cannot afford to stand by and let her get away with this, that's why my father is putting in $10 million of his own money to add to your contribution.__

[**Can I tell my father that you're fighting with us by contributing $250, $100, $50, $25 or even $5 right now?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454459:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)

Like I said Peter, Hillary knows that she can't compete against my father's plans to secure our borders, cut our tax rates, and repeal and replace this disastrous health care debacle called ObamaCare.

**And don't let her tell you otherwise.**

She's lying to us Peter, but she's done that before. This time though, we're not letting her get away with it. We're asking you to help us fight back by funding our final television advertising blitz today.

[**Contribute $250, $100, $50, $25 or even $5 right now so we can fight back this final week of the campaign.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454459:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)

Remember friend, my father is putting in $10 million of his own money because this final week is so crucial to reach as many voters as possible. My father is ramping up his schedule, meeting as many patriots as possible nationwide. He is committed to making this country once again a great nation, one that we can all be proud of.

He's committed Peter, can I tell him that you are too?

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454460:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454461:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454462:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454463:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454459:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)**
Thank you,

Eric Trump
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38454459:sEBialu2N:m:1:876315805:E2FB66AB07A1020B0D8CEDE4F3DA97EC:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

---
**" Mitch McConnell is pounding his finger on the panic button" (_US News_)**
[**Don 't let him steal Pennsylvania. Fight back -> www.katiemcginty.com/deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3167450157876772864/3771228126248435712?refcode=e20161031&refcode2=e20161031nd&amount=25)
**Your donation will be TRIPLED** Hey friends -- things are moving very quickly, so we'll catch you up:

**FIRST:** With your help, Katie overcame her underdog status and jumped into a TIE with extremist Senator Pat Toomey.

**BUT:** As the _Washington Post_ reports, **" the Republican herd of super PAC cash is coming to the rescue**, injecting record levels of cash into key states" like PA!

**SO:** We announced a TRIPLE MATCH on all gifts to help us fight back and CLINCH THIS ELECTION ONCE AND FOR ALL.

[**Katie has never needed you more than she does before this last-ever end-of-month deadline. Please, can you donate a few bucks now? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3167450157876772864/3771228126248435712?refcode=e20161031&refcode2=e20161031nd&amount=25)

Team Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 8 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/3167450157876772864/3771228126248435712?refcode=e20161031&refcode2=e20161031nd&amount=25)**

name: Paul Ryan
subject: This isn’t good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, I'll get right to it. We're at a disadvantage going into the final week of the election. Let's recap. Over the last week, every big-name liberal spent time campaigning for Hillary and down-ballot Democrats. To compound that, Hillary and her Super PAC are shifting their focus to congressional candidates in an effort to give her a Pelosi-led rubber stamp Congress. This means $1.14 billion of PAC money could be aimed at Congress -- and I don't have to tell you how bad that is for our chances on Election Day. Peter -- Regardless of what happens on November 8th, I want to hold Hillary Clinton accountable for her actions -- but I can't do that if Nancy Pelosi takes my place as Speaker. This may be our LAST chance to break their momentum. Tonight marks the final fundraising deadline before the election. I really need 1,334 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap. Will you pitch in? EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $25 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468721:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $50 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468722:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $75 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468723:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $250 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468724:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r Or pitch in another amount via this secure link: http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468725:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r I need you to step up right away. Please don't let me down. Thank you, Speaker Paul Ryan P.S. It all comes down to this. The last fundraising deadline before the election is our final opportunity to catch up to the Democrats before voters head to the polls. If we don't make up ground now, we'll be in big trouble. That's why I pledge to personally match every single gift made through this secure link: http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38468726:s-WFL2uJN:m:3:1155937413:FF2AFC7F77AD0ECD6504009AB1E590AB:r Prefer to donate by mail? EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $25 EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $50 EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $75 EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE $250 Or pitch in another amount via this secure link: I need you to step up right away. Please don't let me down. Thank you, Speaker Paul Ryan P.S. It all comes down to this. The last fundraising deadline before the election is our final opportunity to catch up to the Democrats before voters head to the polls. If we don't make up ground now, we'll be in big trouble. That's why I pledge to personally match every single gift made through this secure link: Prefer to donate by mail? Visit here. name: Ben Carson
subject: The Conversation Continues...
body:
| The Conversation Continues on November 2nd | [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vW6Uvh2uWN)
---|---

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441096:W6Uvh2uWN:m:1:876315805:4F33679A25FFD932E7DEE6602BC8C362:r)

* * *
Dear Peter,

Hundreds of thousands of believers joined us in theaters for Kirk Cameron's national family meeting, **Revive US**. The conversation continues with [My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation About the Importance of Faith in American Culture & Faith](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441096:W6Uvh2uWN:m:1:876315805:4F33679A25FFD932E7DEE6602BC8C362:r). Join me on the evening of Wednesday, November 2nd, and be a part of the conversation with:
* Nationally recognized pastors, **David Jeremia****h** , **Keith Craft** , **J.D. Greear** , **Samuel Rodriguez** , and **Vance Pitman**.
* National news correspondent, author, and speaker, **Megan Alexander**.
* Motivational speaker, former NFL player, and current Texas State Representative, **Scott Turner**
* Eight time Dove Award Winner, **Todd Smith of Selah**.

This is a period in America's history that is calling for the intentional commitment of all 90 million believers, united by the conviction and action of our faith to restore our nation. Our faith matters.

This event will live stream _**FRE**_ _**E**_ over the Internet. [Join with your church, your small group, or your family](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441096:W6Uvh2uWN:m:1:876315805:4F33679A25FFD932E7DEE6602BC8C362:r) so you can continue the conversation after the event.

Now is not the time for silent Christians. Don't miss this. You'll be blessed by it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

[My Faith Matters LIVE: The Importance of Faith in America Culture & Politics](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38441096:W6Uvh2uWN:m:1:876315805:4F33679A25FFD932E7DEE6602BC8C362:r)

**Time:** 7PM (ET) / 6PM (CT)
**Tape Delayed:** 7PM (MT) / 6PM (PT)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Omarosa?=
subject: Bold prediction --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The outcome of the most important election of our lifetime. |

Friend, I’m writing to you today with a bold prediction: Donald J. Trump will be our 45th president. Working with Mr. Trump on The Apprentice, I learned firsthand that he’s a leader and a fighter. He taps into your potential and pushes you to become your very best. And that’s exactly what he’s going to do for our country, Friend. He’s running for president because he loves America. And to prove to you that he truly means it, he’s putting $10 MILLION of his own money into this race for our final ad blitz and Get-Out-The-Vote operation. Now, I’m challenging you, Friend, to step up with Mr. Trump and make your best contribution before the FINAL end-of-month deadline of the election TONIGHT. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $75 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Over the past few months, I’ve gotten the honor of touring our country and meeting the hard-working Americans who’ve been ignored and abandoned by our politicians. Mr. Trump gets that our system is broken, and he isn’t afraid to say it. He has the mindset, experience, and business acumen we need in a leader to fight for the forgotten men and women of our country. That’s the message I use as I meet with communities across the country, advocating on behalf of Mr. Trump. And let me tell you -- that message is sticking. Americans are starved for change. They’re ready for leadership. And our final ad blitz will feature Mr. Trump as that leader who will shake up Washington and deliver REAL CHANGE. But first we need to raise the funds to make it happen before TONIGHT’s deadline. Please join Mr. Trump in making a contribution for our final ad buy before TONIGHT’s FINAL end-of-month deadline. Thank you, Omarosa CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Andrew Whalen, ChrisKoster.com
subject: It's time to double down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5123885383234750464/-1323071428135352320?utm_campaign=fnd_eom_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_161031_fnd_gq_eom_ful__aw)

Hey,

This is crunch time.

Tomorrow, the calendar flips to November and we enter the final week of this race. On November 8th, Missourians will finally get the opportunity to cast their votes for their next Governor and chart the course for the future of our state.

Your support has been instrumental in getting us to the strong position we are in today, but all of our hard work will be wasted if we don't turn out a record number of Missourians next Tuesday. That's why we aren't taking anything for granted in this final week, and we're doubling down on our efforts to reach every Missourian in every corner of the state.

name: Eric Hyers
subject: the scariest costume of all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Do you have your Halloween costume all picked out? For most of us, this is the only day of the year we dress up as someone else.

**But Greg Gianforte has been wearing his "election-year" disguise since announcing his campaign. [Chip in $15 so his ruse doesn't work.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Op%2Frp7gJyi5lmSODAZazk4HKXWP2s0jK)**

As "**election-year Gianforte,** " he's pretending that he didn't advocate for discriminating against the LGBT community.

He's pretending that he didn't file suit against the state to block public stream access.

He's pretending that he never lobbied for a statewide sales tax. Or helped companies outsource American jobs. Or donated to a hate group.

**We need to reveal Gianforte for who he really is -- before Election Day.**

Because if he's ever in the governor's office, **you can be sure the "election-year Gianforte" costume is coming off and we'll see what he's really up to. [Donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yRfhrspx73kQLL9wBU21XYHKXWP2s0jK)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

name: Barney Frank
subject: a serious threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588da/2461175296/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bf?refcode=pme161031bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Florida is a critically important state in this election and Patrick Murphy needs our help. He's locked in an incredibly tight race with Marco Rubio in one of the keys to taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.

But Patrick's Republican opponents are spending millions of dollars on false attack ads and smears against him. They're flooding Florida with dark money to prop up Marco Rubio -- the same guy who said he hates serving in the Senate and promised not to run again. [**Can you give $10 now to defeat him?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588da/2461175296/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bf?refcode=pme161031bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

The GOP knows Patrick is a serious threat to their Senate control. They know he's got what it takes to win -- he's done it before. He can beat them again, but he needs to meet his campaign's biggest deadline yet at midnight. [**Can you chip in?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588da/2461175296/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bf?refcode=pme161031bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick couldn't be more different from Marco Rubio. He's a hard worker with deep convictions. I know he will show up and work hard to make our shared progressive values a reality. [**Give whatever you can now before this month is over to help him win >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588da/2461175296/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bf?refcode=pme161031bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

If we elect Patrick, he will bring the fight to the U.S. Senate and help improve the lives of all Americans.

Thank you,
Barney Frank

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588db/2461175296/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e6a/738133e4/322ad7b6/7f8588d4/2461175296/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: John Kasich
subject: Midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising
body:
Peter, it is CRITICAL that we hold our majorities in the House
and the Senate.

President Obama is targeting our Republican House candidates
with TV commercials and Hillary's Super PACs are pouring millions
into the campaigns of our Democrat opponents.

There is a critical October deadline tonight at midnight
and it'll be our final opportunity to meet our
fundraising goal and show the strength of our campaigns.

Can you help out with a contribution of $10,
$25 or more right now?

If we lose the White House and our majorities in Congress,
Hillary will have a blank check to continue the Obama agenda.
Americans deserve better.

Chip in right now to help hit this critical
fundraising goal and ensure that our Republican candidates win.

Thank you for all that you're doing to help.

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Join to help me win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We’re so close – help us hit Trump Victory Goal by MIDNIGHT deadline. |

Friend, This is urgent, so I’ll get right to the point. Our final end-of-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at midnight... and we still need you on board to win Big League on Election Day. Last Friday, I made another huge personal commitment to win this race, putting in $10 million to close strong – I know we can win, and I know we cannot afford to lose. And that’s why we launched the $10 Million Trump Victory Goal last week too – our final big push to get EVERY one of my supporters to join Team Trump. Every bit of support will be a huge help for the final week of the campaign, and I am so grateful for ALL that you’re doing to help me win. It’s now or never, Friend – JOIN Team Trump with your most generous possible contribution. CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT As President of the United States, I will be your voice in Washington. I won’t let the career politicians rip you off anymore, and I will get our country much better deals to bring back jobs, revitalize our American economy and restore the American Dream. But first we need to win resoundingly on November 8th, and we’re up against a well-funded and DESPERATE Clinton campaign machine. You know they will say and do anything to win, and you know we can never count on the liberal media to hold Crooked Hillary accountable. It’s up to us to reach voters directly to share all that’s at stake next Tuesday. Help us build our momentum, get-out-the-vote and win – JOIN BY MIDNIGHT to help us hit our Trump Victory Goal. Thank you. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. It’s now or never – I need you on board to help me win this historic race and get to work in Washington. Join Team Trump before our midnight deadline. CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm busting my tail across the country because we will not -- and cannot -- allow the Republicans to keep control of the Senate. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161031-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- I'm busting my tail across the country because we will not -- and cannot -- allow the Republicans to keep control of the Senate.

That became especially clear after the Senate Republicans stood by Donald Trump -- despite every sexist, racist, hateful thing that he has said. I guess there was nothing that mattered to them except that he carries the Republican flag.

**This election isn 't just about the Presidency and Senate control anymore. It's a fundamental question about our values -- who we are as a people, and what kind of country we want to be. It's about whether we will stand up and say that we are better than this.**

[**I 've made my choice, and that's why I'm doing everything I can to help the DSCC elect strong, principled Senate Democrats who will protect our progress. But I can't do it alone Friend, so can I count on you to join me today?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20161031-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I know because I've been in Wisconsin with Russ Feingold, who is ready to take on the powerful interests. I've been in Pennsylvania with Katie McGinty, who is eager to raise the minimum wage. And I've been in Illinois with Tammy Duckworth, who's leading the charge for equal pay for equal work. And Nevada. And Missouri. And North Carolina. And New Hampshire -- shoot, you know the list!

We have a great opportunity, but if we don't give everything we've got to take back the Senate, we'll spend another two years on defense -- and unable to get good nominees confirmed by the Senate.

body: Peter, I'll get right to it. We're at a disadvantage going into the final week of the election. Let's recap. Over the last week, every big-name liberal spent time campaigning for Hillary and down-ballot Democrats. To compound that, Hillary and her Super PAC are shifting their focus to congressional candidates in an effort to give her a Pelosi-led rubber stamp Congress. This means $1.14 billion of PAC money could be aimed at Congress -- and I don't have to tell you how bad that is for our chances on Election Day. Peter -- Regardless of what happens on November 8th, I want to hold Hillary Clinton accountable for her actions -- but I can't do that if Nancy Pelosi takes my place as Speaker. This may be our LAST chance to break their momentum. Tonight marks the final fundraising deadline before the election. I really need 1,334 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap. Will you pitch in? All eyes are on New Hampshire's race that will decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court, friends.
**But we're falling short of our FINAL end-of-month goal -- the most important of the campaign by far -- and recent polls show that if the election were today, WE WOULD LOSE.**
That's because right-wing groups tied to the Koch Brothers, Mitch McConnell, and Karl Rove have spent more than $50 MILLION to stop Governor Hassan. And they're going to spend even more in the final eight days to try to keep their obstructionist Senate.
The ONLY way we'll be able to fight back and pull ahead is if grassroots supporters like YOU give right now: **[Please give $3 or more, every dollar you can, to hit our $75,000 goal by midnight so we can win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcc2/2a380d31/172b7b98/ffa884/2901473646/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMxYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161031am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that New Hampshire voters have 16 times more power to determine control of the Senate than average American voters, but we could LOSE this race and hand the Senate (and control of the Supreme Court) to Washington insiders Mitch McConnell and Kelly Ayotte.
We only have eight days to turn this around, but we're falling dangerously short of our goal. We need you to step up right now and give before tonight's end-of-month deadline. **Your gift right now could be the difference between winning in New Hampshire and losing our best chance to take back the Senate:**

name: Katie McGinty
subject: we know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friends --

I know you've heard from us a lot recently, but I have to ask again because there is SO much riding on the next eight days. [**Can you pitch in (before the triple match expires)?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7751231370055122944/8095809668430954496?refcode=e20161031.4&refcode2=e20161031.4nd&amount=25)

We know Pat Toomey -- and we know what he stands for:

* His terrible trade policies **cost more than 120,000 good jobs** in Pennsylvania

* Toomey rubber-stamped Mitch McConnell's **blockade of the Supreme Court nomination**

* His radical social agenda is (according to the _Philadelphia Inquirer_) **" right out of the Tea Party playbook"**

**A brand new _Muhlenberg/Morning Call_ poll -- just 3 days old -- shows this race is TIED at 41% - 41%.** Team, we urgently need to reach those undecided voters who will swing this race.

[**Every donation is critical -- and for the next few hours, every donation is **TRIPLED** to make 3X the impact. Can you pitch in before our end-of-month deadline at midnight? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7751231370055122944/8095809668430954496?refcode=e20161031.4&refcode2=e20161031.4nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, donate now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7751231370055122944/8095809668430954496?refcode=e20161031.4&refcode2=e20161031.4nd&amount=25)**
So close --

Katie

---
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 8 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7751231370055122944/8095809668430954496?refcode=e20161031.4&refcode2=e20161031.4nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7751231370055122944/8023752074393026560).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

Hi there --
Governor Hassan has another debate with Senator Ayotte this Wednesday, and we're hoping that you'll join us outside the debate to cheer her on and show that we've got the strongest grassroots support in the Granite State.
**WHEN:** Wednesday, November 2; Meet at 5:00 PM
**WHERE:** Saint Anselm College, New Hampshire Institute of Politics
100 Saint Anselm Drive, Manchester, NH 03102
**[RSVP Here](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd8/2a380d31/172b5287/ffa411/2250611340/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/wmur-debate?&source=20161031_WMUR")**
With the election just over a week away, we're going all out to ensure that Maggie wins this race. We look forward to seeing you there, and thanks again for fighting with us. Onward to victory.
-- Team Maggie

body:
Are you in? We need every supporter on board to hit our Trump Victory Goal tonight and WIN next Tuesday. |

Friend, *** FINAL DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT TONIGHT *** I’m sure you saw the news. My father is putting in $10 million to close strong and win big on Election Day. He’s ready and determined to get to work for you in the White House and fix the broken system. And now we’re getting so close to meeting our end-of-month $20 Million Trump Victory Goal. We need you on board now more than ever before to blow this grassroots fundraising goal out of the water. You’ll help fund our final ads and Team Trump ground efforts. Our deadline is at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT – and with just eight days until Election Day we can’t afford to fall short. Join with an emergency contribution RIGHT NOW. Help make sure we leave nothing on the table and WIN to put my father in the White House. CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Friend, I know you’re supporting my father and want to see him win on Election Day – but our records show you haven’t joined yet, and we need you on Team Trump. When my father is sworn into office on January 20, 2017, the American people will finally have a voice again in Washington. He is fighting to bring back jobs, repeal Obamacare, fix our schools, make our country and neighborhoods safe again and unite our people behind putting our country first. It will be an INCREDIBLE new day for America. This race is coming down to the wire. We need you on board, and when you join today I’ll add your name to the list of new supporters I send my father each morning. This is it Friend – don’t wait another day. We must hit our Trump Victory Goal to put up our final ads and rush resources to key battlegrounds. For America, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: What’s scarier than Halloween? (Plus NEW video!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Happy Halloween! Wishing everyone a fun, safe Halloween with friends and family. (And parents, NO STEALING candy from the kids this year!)
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1347161218317350144/5653937272907827968?v=DtMrCo5JXJc) Dear Peter, Happy Halloween! Wishing everyone a fun, safe Halloween with friends and family. (And parents, NO STEALING candy from the kids this year!) After tonight, haunted houses and Halloween costumes will go away until next year. Unfortunately, there's something even scarier that won't go away on November 1st: opioid abuse. **[Check out our new video on Opioid Abuse in Utah and what can be done about it:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1347161218317350144/5653937272907827968?v=DtMrCo5JXJc)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1347161218317350144/5725994866945755904?v=DtMrCo5JXJc) Did you know that 24 Utahns die a month from opioid overdose? This is heartbreaking and unacceptable. It's time to embrace safe, smart solutions that will literally save lives. **[If you agree, sign up to VOLUNTEER and tell other voters what's at stake this November!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1347161218317350144/5798052460983683840)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---
Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States

subject: This is it

body:
Time's running out to give Democrats the resources it takes to flip the Senate. If we miss our goal, Republican big money will sweep away everything we've fought for... The GOP's presumptive nominee has made destroying our progress his top priority -- and Republican senators are right there with him. We can't let them succeed.

name: Team Bayh
subject: knock knock: it’s the Koch brothers 🚪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d8/7be36b49/1e145b24/78f9a8c4/931230551/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
**" Mitch McConnell is pounding his finger on the panic button"**
\-- (_US News_) Friend -- Between the additional $4 million Mitch McConnell's Super PAC is plowing into Indiana and the Koch brothers' field team at our doors, **it 's clear that special interests will stop at nothing to prop up Todd Young and defeat Evan.**

**[Chip in $5 right now to fight back _(your gift will be matched until midnight!)._](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d8/7be36b49/1e145b24/78f9a8cb/931230551/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.1&amount=10")**

This much spending so late in the race could be a game-changer if we don't do anything. That's why we have to hit our **final $60,000 end-of-month goal BY TONIGHT** \-- or Evan's chances of victory will **plummet.**

Look, in a race this close, every single dollar is crucial to countering misleading attacks and boosting Evan in the polls. **He 's the one candidate in this race who will put Hoosiers first and work to end the gridlock in Washington -- so _let 's get him into office!_**

**[We're running of time -- will you chip in $5 before tonight's deadline to make sure we hit our goal? Your gift will be matched!](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505d8/7be36b49/1e145b24/78f9a8cb/931230551/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.1&amount=10")**

Team Bayh

clean_body: | "" " Mitch McConnell is pounding his finger on the panic button" \-- (US News) Friend -- Between the additional $4 million Mitch McConnell's Super PAC is plowing into Indiana and the Koch brothers' field team at our doors, it 's clear that special interests will stop at nothing to prop up Todd Young and defeat Evan. "" This much spending so late in the race could be a game-changer if we don't do anything. That's why we have to hit our final $60,000 end-of-month goal BY TONIGHT \-- or Evan's chances of victory will plummet. Look, in a race this close, every single dollar is crucial to countering misleading attacks and boosting Evan in the polls. He 's the one candidate in this race who will put Hoosiers first and work to end the gridlock in Washington -- so let 's get him into office! "" Thanks, Team Bayh ******** ""****** Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

JOIN US IN SELMA, NC THURSDAY!
| Dear Peter,

Remember to get your tickets to join Donald Trump and team in Selma, NC **Thursday, Nov. 3rd at 7:00 PM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fselma-nc%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nc_selma1103i&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/selma-nc/"). Details about the event are below:

****Thursday, Nov. 3rd: Selma, NC
**** The Farm
215 Batten Road
Selma, NC 27576

Doors Open: 4:00 PM
Event Begins: 7:00 PM
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fselma-nc%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nc_selma1103i&n=4 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/selma-nc/").
__ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

Team Trump–Pence

body:
I am challenging Americans everywhere to step up. |

You know what’s really scary today, Friend? The idea that Hillary Clinton could be president and continue all the disastrous policies that are killing the middle class: the open borders, the globalist trade deals that ship jobs overseas, the runaway crime and the crushing burden of health care costs. YOU CAN STOP THAT DISASTER FROM HAPPENING – DONATE TO THE TRUMP CAMPAIGN TODAY. My father wants better for all of us, and that is why he is putting $10 million of his own money into the campaign. And I am challenging Americans everywhere to step up donate another $10 million to fund our final advertising and Get-Out-The-Vote blitz! You know how frightening the DC elites are, so I am asking you to please chip in one urgent donation ASAP. We only have eight days to go . . . eight days that will determine the future of our country. Hillary Clinton will spend those eight days unloading a ton of money on negative attack ads. Her friends in the media will spend those eight days lying about my father. It won’t work as long as proud citizens like you rise up with us and fight for the future of our country. Help us fight back and win by donating $35, $50, $100 or even more NOW. Thank you! Donald Trump Jr. DONATE TO THE TRUMP $20 MILLION CHALLENGE

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Tom Russell, RussFeingold.com
subject: Let's win this thing

body:
This is where things stand: | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467b/1c469400/131385c/354328e/1117215726/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom&utm_medium=ema") Friend, nine days to go, and here's where things stand
* Since we launched our Close-the-Gap fundraising drive, over 25,000 grassroots contributions have come in. (That's amazing!)
* We're around $100,000 short of hitting our goal by midnight.
* Billionaire Diane Hendricks just gave one of Senator Johnson's super PACs a $5 million infusion of last-minute cash, and some polls are showing us within the margin of error.

It's my job to make the numbers add up. And I'm here to tell you that every dollar makes a difference. I'm hard at work, adjusting budgets hourly, squeezing the most out of every contribution that comes in.**We're still short, and if we want to keep pace, we need you to step up right now.** [**Contribute $5 today to help Russ close the gap before the midnight deadline.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467b/1c469400/131385c/354328e/1117215726/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467b/1c469400/131385c/354328e/1117215726/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467b/1c469400/131385c/354328e/1117215726/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf467b/1c469400/131385c/354328f/1117215726/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct_eom_12-nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Marc Goldberg
subject: the most impact (says FiveThirtyEight)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd0/2a380d31/1728e9f3/ffa25a/996932061/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd0/2a380d31/1728e9f3/ffa25a/996932061/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Friends, in just eight days, Governor Maggie Hassan's race in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court -- but recent polls show if the election were held today, we would lose.
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that a voter in New Hampshire is 18 times more likely to determine Senate control than the average American voter. **That means if you care about taking back a Democratic Senate, the single most impactful action you can take right now is donating to our campaign to help Maggie win in New Hampshire:**

Corporate special interests have spent $50 MILLION to defeat Maggie and keep the obstructionist Republican Senate majority. Our race is one of the MOST EXPENSIVE in the country, and we're running out of time to fight back.
**We'll ONLY win if supporters like you step up right NOW -- and every dollar you give will go 18 times further to take back the Democratic Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court:**

Your gift will go 18 times further to take back the Democratic Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd0/2a380d31/1728e9f3/ffa25b/996932061/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMxbWlkLW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161031mid-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e68/738133e4/3221b3e5/7f858a16/1278863639/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031pm?refcode=pme161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| **_Roll Call:_ "Obama Puts Bull's-Eye on Rubio During Feisty Orlando Rally"** Did you see President Obama's speech? He made sure voters know just how terrible Marco Rubio is for Florida -- from his flip-flopping on immigration reform, to his attempts to defund Planned Parenthood, to his denial of manmade climate change. **[Click here to watch the clip, then chip in to help us take him down>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e68/738133e4/3221b3e5/7f858a16/1278863639/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031pm?refcode=pme161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")** President Obama reminded the crowd that Patrick is a "hard worker" who "actually shows up to his job." He will "put you ahead of politics."

Know who won't? Marco Rubio, who puts himself before Florida families. Every. Single. Time. **That 's why President Obama is targeting him in his speeches.** He knows we have to end Rubio's political career. And to do that, we need you to help with our final End of Month goal of $150,000. [**Chip in to stand with Pres. Obama, help us make our goal, & defeat Rubio >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e68/738133e4/3221b3e5/7f858a16/1278863639/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031pm?refcode=pme161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

POTUS also called out Rubio for his cowardly support of Donald Trump: "There's one other big difference between Patrick and Marco Rubio. Marco Rubio still supports Donald Trump." "C'mon man!" [**If you 're with Pres. Obama and you're ready to defeat Rubio and retake the Senate, contribute $5 now before tonight's End of Month Deadline >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e68/738133e4/3221b3e5/7f858a16/1278863639/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031pm?refcode=pme161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Team Murphy

P.S. Miss the speech? [**Watch our favorite section here.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e68/738133e4/3221b3e5/7f858a16/1278863639/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031pm?refcode=pme161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Don't turn Indiana into the Twilight Zone -- help us reach our goal by midnight.

Peter, Want to hear something truly spooky? If we don't hit our goal by midnight, we could end up with another four years of Pence-style politics. **Don 't turn Indiana into the Twilight Zone -- chip in to help me reach our $30,000 get-out-the-vote goal before midnight.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4824402605084379136/-3771903725518059520?utm_campaign=fnd_eom5_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161031_fnd_gq_eom5_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)

---
Right now, things look pretty good -- especially with four big newspaper endorsements over the weekend.
But if midnight strikes and we don't raise the money to fund our get-out-the-vote plan, we could see a big transformation in this race.
And no, I don't mean that our Moving Indiana Forward Tour bus will turn into a pumpkin -- I mean that the wave of attacks from the opposition could flip the polls in the wrong direction.
**[Don't let our state government get any scarier than it already it is. Chip in by midnight to make sure we can get out the vote. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/4824402605084379136/-3771903725518059520?utm_campaign=fnd_eom5_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161031_fnd_gq_eom5_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**

John

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our final deadline is just hours away. | Dear Friend, Our final end-of-month fundraising deadline is just hours away. We set an ambitious goal for this deadline: $20,000. That's because every dollar is going into voter outreach as folks across the state make their choice for governor. So I'm asking directly, right now, for $25: _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&rt=0)**
Here's why I'm asking: Right now, we still need another **$7,970** to hit our target.
That's $7,970 that can be used immediately for more door knocking and phone banking with voters we must turn out if Jay is going to win on November 8th. Jay's got a powerful story to tell: Together we've built a stronger economy, we've taken on climate change, and we've made real investments in our schools. We need to to tell that story, and leave it all on the field between now and Election Day.
So, I need to be able to tell Jay and the team they can count on more resources for our Get Out the Vote operation, and final flight of ads, in this last critical week before Election Day.
None of us want to leave anything on the table. Your immediate help means we can close out this campaign having done everything possible to make sure Jay wins.
[**Will you pitch in right away? Our deadline is midnight.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
You and I know that losing would have consequences -- it could mean going back on the progress we've fought for on an economy that works for every Washington family, on climate action, and on funding our schools. We can't afford to let that happen.
Thank you for all you are doing,
Tracy
Finance Director
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc5MDE0NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjQ1NjQxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Steve Bullock
subject: this state is for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Happy Halloween! This year the Bullock family is dressing up as first responders.

We're looking forward to handing out candy and seeing friends and neighbors tonight. **That's what makes Montana great -- the strong sense of community and belief that this state is for _all_ of us.**

**[Will you pitch in $15 to make sure it stays this way?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ow6cSJhKhB8opVT9V0wqFGBRW3z2q%2F9n)**

The direction Greg Gianforte would take this state scares me. His agenda of reckless tax breaks for millionaires, diverting money from public schools and an out-of-the-mainstream, exclusionary approach to social issues is just not who we are.

I hope you have a great time with your family this evening. **I wouldn't bug you if this race wasn't so close and it wasn't so important.[Click here to contribute $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3O7ODFABMdcsU3RAnEJyuWBRW3z2q%2F9n)**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock
---

name: Team Cole
subject: West Virginia needs Bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAPITO FOR WEST VIRGINIA
body:
---
| ********_****_ Dear Friend –

The election is only days away – and it is critical that we elect a proven leader like Bill Cole as Governor.

West Virginia needs a Governor who knows what it takes to grow jobs and strengthen our economy.

Bill Cole is a proven job creator who understands that a stronger West Virginia requires investments in critical infrastructure like broadband that will make us more competitive now and in the future.

He understands that in order to compete, we must create an environment where our small businesses and our people can thrive.

Bill Cole has the right vision and priorities to move our state forward, and he is exactly the kind of leader we need as West Virginia’s next Governor.
[
**Will you consider chipping in $25, $50 or even $100 to help elect Bill Cole?**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=billcole_nationbuilder_com_capito&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smc&n=1)

The stakes in this election couldn’t be higher. West Virginia is at a cross roads, and Bill Cole will help put us on the right path.

[**If you can donate a larger amount of $250, $500, or even $1,000 today**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=Hyperlink_20161028_115426960&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smc&n=2)**,** please know your financial support will be put to good use in the closing days of this race.

Your support of Bill Cole is so important to the future of our state.

Thank you,

Shelley | [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=body_text_donate+button&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=smc&n=3)

body:

| |

| I wish I had more exciting news, but if we work hard and reach our final monthly goal, our big celebration will come on Election Day.

Right now, this race couldn't be closer. **A _NBC News/Wall Street Journal/Marist_ poll just came out that had us neck-and-neck with Senator Burr at 48%.**

**We are fighting for every vote.**

We are trying to overcome special interest spending, reach voters face-to-face or through ads, and keep our ground game strong through Election Day.

[_**I want nothing more than to be your Senator so I can bring economic security, fairness, and equality to North Carolina. But I can 't get there without your grassroots support. It will be the difference in this race. Give $5 and we'll make it $15.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4279a/2cc31c44/49fa2c4/19f9b5fe/2384743734/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161031pm?refcode=dre161031pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Deborah |

body:
I’m personally adding $10 million to this huge End of Month drive. |

Friend, We’re going to make history in just 8 days, Friend -- if you’ll take historic action of your own right now and partner with me today. It’s Halloween -- the last day of October -- and tonight at midnight, just 5 hours from now, your chance to make a generous October End of Month Fundraising Drive contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can spare will be gone. That’s right, Friend, I need you to take the extra step and help me ensure that Team Trump has enough funding to have a huge final week and win an incredible victory on Election Day. So I’m personally putting $10 million to this huge End of Month drive -- and asking you to help us make it $20 million before midnight tonight. Friend, this is the last End of Month Fundraising Deadline of the campaign -- and whatever we raise now will have to fund our final messaging and all-important Get-Out-the-Vote programs in time to make a difference before November 8th. We have been setting small donor records all fall -- but we need to set the biggest record yet for October -- because Crooked Hillary has an endless war chest to spend. We don’t have to have more, just enough to win -- and we aren’t there yet. So please Friend, let’s do what we must to finish this epic quest -- this unprecedented popular movement to Make America Great Again. Join me by making your best October End of Month contribution now. Thank you Friend -- please let me hear from you before the clock strikes midnight tonight. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. Friend, it’s crunch time -- time to stand up at long last and restore our government, our prosperity, and our precious American freedom. Let’s make this October End of Month the launch pad for November victory -- make an urgent October End of Month gift to Team Trump today. Thanks again, Donald. CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: I’m personally adding $10 million to this huge End of Month drive. | Friend, We’re going to make history in just 8 days, Friend -- if you’ll take historic action of your own right now and partner with me today. It’s Halloween -- the last day of October -- and tonight at midnight, just 5 hours from now, your chance to make a generous October End of Month Fundraising Drive contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can spare will be gone. That’s right, Friend, I need you to take the extra step and help me ensure that Team Trump has enough funding to have a huge final week and win an incredible victory on Election Day. So I’m personally putting $10 million to this huge End of Month drive -- and asking you to help us make it $20 million before midnight tonight. Friend, this is the last End of Month Fundraising Deadline of the campaign -- and whatever we raise now will have to fund our final messaging and all-important Get-Out-the-Vote programs in time to make a difference before November 8th. We have been setting small donor records all fall -- but we need to set the biggest record yet for October -- because Crooked Hillary has an endless war chest to spend. We don’t have to have more, just enough to win -- and we aren’t there yet. So please Friend, let’s do what we must to finish this epic quest -- this unprecedented popular movement to Make America Great Again. Join me by making your best October End of Month contribution now. Thank you Friend -- please let me hear from you before the clock strikes midnight tonight. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. Friend, it’s crunch time -- time to stand up at long last and restore our government, our prosperity, and our precious American freedom. Let’s make this October End of Month the launch pad for November victory -- make an urgent October End of Month gift to Team Trump today. Thanks again, Donald. CONTRIBUTE $100 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

| **For Immediate Release:**
October 31st, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Phil Scott Campaign Kicks Off High Road to Victory Tour in Final Week of Election**

_Scott’s tour to promote affordability and economic growth priorities in high-energy sprint to the November 8 th election_
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott today launched his High Road to Victory Tour (#riseaboveit) with stops in St. Albans, Newport, and St. Johnsbury. The 8-day, 14-county tour features discussions with voters, business and school visits, community events, media interviews, sign waves and much more leading up to the November 8th election.

The High Road to Victory Tour hits its peak on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans.

“Phil Scott is the hardest working candidate in this election, engaging with thousands of Vermonters and presenting the most comprehensive blueprint for economic growth of any candidate for Governor,” said campaign spokeswoman Brittney Wilson. “This tour will build on the immense support we have across the state for Phil’s plans to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable and invest in pro-growth areas like early education and infrastructure,” Wilson added.

**The media is invited to join Phil and the team on the road.**

The schedule for Tuesday, November 1st follows:

**_TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 1, 2016: RUTLAND AND BENNINGTON COUNTIES_**

7:00 a.m. Sign Wave & Media Availability (Open Press)
Location: Rutland, Intersection of Routes 4 & 7

8:30 a.m. WBTN Interview (Phone Interview)

9:00 a.m. Tour Rutland with Local Candidates (Open Press)

11:30 a.m Sign Wave & Media Availability (Open Press)
Location: Rutland, Intersection of Routes 4 & 7

1:15 p.m. Manchester Maple Street Middle School (Open Press)
Location: 322 Maple Street, Manchester Center

2:00 p.m. Sign Wave, Campaigning w/Local Candidate (Open Press)
Media Availability
Location: Manchester Roundabout

3:45 p.m. Sign Wave, Media Availability & Downtown Tour (Open Press)
Location: Downtown Bennington, Intersection of Routes 7 & 9

7:00 p.m. Hop n’ Moose with Local Legislators & Candidates (Open Press)
Game 6 of World Series
Location: 41 Center Street, Rutland

###

---

Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Emily Gurwitz
subject: One last request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e4/7be36b49/1e100d31/78f9acc5/546801822/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I'll be really quick. The last end-of-month deadline of this election is hitting in six hours...but we're still $8,033 short of our goal.

We budget things very carefully on campaigns. If we don't close this gap, it'll mean fewer canvasses, fewer yard signs, and fewer voting reminders than we need to win.

So I'm reaching out to a few dedicated supporters. I know we ask you for a lot, but I'm getting desperate here. **[Can you chip in $5 to help us reach our October goal? All gifts before midnight will be matched.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e4/7be36b49/1e100d31/78f9acc4/546801822/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.3&amount=10")**

I really appreciate your help!

Six hours left,

Emily Gurwitz
Finance Director

dpwillis67@gmail.com

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Mr. Trump is personally adding $10 million to this huge End of Month drive. |

Friend, It’s here -- it's Halloween -- the last day of October -- and tonight at midnight, just 3 hours from now, your chance to take action with a difference-making October End of Month Fundraising Drive contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to help make Donald Trump our 45th President of the United States is gone. Tonight, millions of Americans will enjoy the fun of Halloween -- maybe you’re taking your children trick-or-treating tonight or welcoming the neighborhood kids at your home. But Friend, if you really want to do something for America’s kids and grandkids, help Donald Trump make their future one of renewed promise instead of further decline. Mr. Trump is ready to Make America Great Again -- and he's adding $10 million from his own pocket to help us reach our $20 million End of October goal. Friend, this is the last End of Month Fundraising Deadline of the campaign -- and we must ensure that we reach our critical goal by midnight to keep our final messaging and all-important Get-Out-the-Vote programs fully-funded and effective right through November 8th. So please Friend, do something for our future that will last a lot longer than the candy in trick-or-treaters’ bags -- make a generous October End of Month contribution to Donald Trump for President now. Sincerely, Katrina Pierson P.S. Friend, there’s nothing you can do between now and Election Day that will have a bigger impact on America’s future than helping Donald Trump become our next President with your urgent October End of Month gift to Team Trump today. Please hurry -- you now have less than 3 hours to respond. Thanks again, Katrina. CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
