name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Hillary Clinton and fracked oil (important)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
We wanted to make sure you saw our petition yesterday asking Secretary Clinton to oppose the Dakota Access pipeline. If she becomes president, she will have the power to halt its construction and prevent the irreparable harm the pipeline would do to the land, water, and climate in the region.
[**Add your name to our petition calling on Hillary Clinton to say she opposes the Dakota Access pipeline, and asking her to cancel its construction if she is the next president.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")
See below for our original message on why this pipeline must be stopped.
\- The team at Our Revolution
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HILLARY CLINTON](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")**
* * *

# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")

Police stormed the Native encampment in the path of the Dakota Access pipeline and arrested more than 100 people trying to stop this pipeline's threat to water sources and climate change. **There's only one person who has the power to stop this pipeline from being built: Hillary Clinton.** If she says she totally opposes the pipeline, it won't be built.
[**Add your name to our petition calling on Hillary Clinton to oppose the Dakota Access pipeline.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HILLARY CLINTON](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")**
Sisters and Brothers,
The Dakota Access pipeline would carry some of the dirtiest oil on the planet across four states, putting at risk farms, native land, critical water sources, and our fight against climate change.
Tens of thousands of members of Our Revolution have stood up to oppose the construction of the pipeline, and you've helped contribute tens of thousands of dollars to the Standing Rock Sioux tribe leading the fight against the pipeline in North Dakota.
But this week things took a turn for the worse. **Police armed in military gear stormed the occupation, arresting more than 100 Native activists, journalists, and others there in solidarity, and destroyed the Native encampment in the path of the pipeline.**
This is an unacceptable escalation with the explicit goal of allowing a corporation to profit off of the continued destruction of our planet. And so we must escalate as well.
There is one person who will have the power to stop the Dakota Access Pipeline: Secretary Hillary Clinton. If she is to be our next president, she will have the power to stop the pipeline. And our best opportunity to get her to oppose it is before the election.
[**Please add your name to our petition calling on Hillary Clinton to say she opposes the Dakota Access pipeline, and asking her to cancel its construction if she is the next president.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")
Native American youth held an action in the lobby of Secretary Clinton's campaign headquarters asking her to oppose the pipeline. They delivered a letter from the tribes involved, and the response from Secretary Clinton's campaign was thoroughly disappointing.
Clinton's campaign said:
> "We received a letter today from representatives of the tribes protesting the construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. From the beginning of this campaign, Secretary Clinton has been clear that she thinks all voices should be heard and all views considered in federal infrastructure projects. Now, all of the parties involved--including the federal government, the pipeline company and contractors, the state of North Dakota, and the tribes--need to find a path forward that serves the broadest public interest. As that happens, it's important that on the ground in North Dakota, everyone respects demonstrators' rights to protest peacefully, and workers' rights to do their jobs safely."
This is the complete wrong way to consider what's happening with this pipeline. The pipeline would carry millions of gallons of fracked oil. It threatens to poison the Standing Rock Sioux's source of water. It would threaten farmers' livelihood. It is a huge threat to climate change.
The only path forward should be cancelling the pipeline. Period.
We think that if hundreds of thousands of people call on Hillary Clinton to oppose the pipeline as soon as possible, we can secure a commitment to have the pipeline canceled if she's president. But our best chance is before the election. That's why it is so important to take action now.
[**The window is closing for us to get Hillary Clinton to oppose the Dakota Access pipeline. Add your name to our petition now asking her to promise to cancel the pipeline, and we'll deliver your signature to her campaign.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")
We can stop this pipeline if all of us stand together. Thank you for supporting Native tribes, farmers, and everyone trying to save our planet.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Our Revolution
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HILLARY CLINTON](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/hillary-clinton-DAPL?source=em161031-kicker")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002 | (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Marc Goldberg
subject: polls we've seen recently (deadline TONIGHT)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd4/2a380d31/1723ad68/ffbaee/946358412/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd4/2a380d31/1723ad68/ffbaee/946358412/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Wanted to let you in on some of the poll numbers we've seen recently -- a few have us up, a handful have us down, there are a couple of ties, and **virtually all of them are locked in the margin of error.** Basically THE race that will determine Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court is anyone's game.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdcd4/2a380d31/1723ad68/ffbaef/946358412/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDMxX0VPTS1NUEdfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161031_EOM-MPG_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
You can help change that -- we're crashing on our end-of-month fundraising deadline so we can raise the money we need to reach more voters and elect Governor Hassan to the Senate. Friends, Tonight at midnight is the final fundraising deadline of this election. That's right -- after hundreds of emails just like this over the last year, this is it. The next deadline in this race is Election Day. **Tonight's midnight deadline is the most important of the race. Kate, my finance director, tells me we're about $25,000 short of our goal right now. Can you chip in now to help us get there over these final six hours?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a4a/2fde7c66/4375f5dd/15693804/730728084/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-oct16eom-biggestdeadline?utm_campaign=fnd_eom10_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161031_fnd_gq_eom10_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Roy

name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
We're close, but close is not enough. |
Friend, I wanted to send you a quick note before we hit our final media buy deadline tonight at midnight.

Our team has been watching our totals closely and we need your help to reach our goal in time. We're close, but close is not enough.

We just learned this afternoon that our opponent placed a new media buy in the Baltimore area attacking Chris. This is no time for us to slow down. [**We need top supporters like you to stand with us right now, friend, so we can continue to get Chris' positive message out there. Please chip in $25 or whatever you can to help.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b77/70cdc2ba/4732cd23/39788d9/309407385/VEsH/ name: Barack Obama
subject: let's talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e66/738133e4/33d81fbf/7f858b9c/2574400170/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bo?refcode=pme161031bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Everyone --

I wanted to talk to you about something really important to me: Florida's Senate race and my friend Patrick Murphy.

Patrick is a strong leader. He's a champion for our shared Democratic values. He's committed to working hard for Floridians. I can count on Patrick, and you can too.

But he's in a tight race with Marco Rubio. This one's going to be close on Election Day. It comes down to this: **Marco seems to just care about hanging onto his job. Patrick Murphy cares about you.**

[**And with everything that 's on the line, we need Patrick in the Senate -- can you help out his campaign with $10 for their final push?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e66/738133e4/33d81fbf/7f858b9c/2574400170/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bo?refcode=pme161031bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick is a strong progressive. He'll keep working to protect Social Security and Medicare, address climate change, defend a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions, and stand up to the NRA.

_And that 's just why Republicans are spending so much money to defeat him._ They know he will fight relentlessly for what's right -- and they know he can beat his opponent, Marco Rubio.

You deserve leaders who show up to work. We need you on our side to make sure Patrick comes out on top in just 8 days.

[**Can you contribute a few dollars now to help Patrick and his team before their last big monthly deadline tonight?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e66/738133e4/33d81fbf/7f858b9c/2574400170/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161031bo?refcode=pme161031bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thank you,
Barack Obama

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e66/738133e4/33d81fbf/7f858b9d/2574400170/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e66/738133e4/33d81fbf/7f858b9e/2574400170/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Rob Portman
subject: just a few hours
body:
| Peter,

I just left our Terrace Park campaign office after visiting with our incredible volunteers and interns who have worked hard to contact more than 5.3 million targeted voters since May of last year.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DQmXxN8BwVHk%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=1)
Earlier today, we had an exciting special guest on the campaign trail -- the Golden Bear himself, [Jack Nicklaus](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DQmXxN8BwVHk%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=2)! Jack and Barbara joined us at our Columbus and Dayton offices to thank our volunteers as we begin our final push towards Election Day. **[Click here to see the highlights!](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DQmXxN8BwVHk%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=3)**

**There's just one week left in this campaign.** For nearly two years, we've been knocking on doors, making phone calls, and spreading our message of pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs. It is crunch time and we need your help more than ever.

**Our last end-of-month deadline is tonight. A generous group of donors agreed to match all contributions until midnight.** **[Donate $25>>> Matched to $50](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ%26edon%3D25%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=4)**

**[Donate $50>>> Matched to $100](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ%26edon%3D50%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=5)**

**[Donate $75>>> Matched to $150](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ%26edon%3D75%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=6)**

**[Donate $150>>> Matched to $300](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ%26edon%3D150&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=7)** The fate of our Republican Senate majority comes down to Ohio, and I cannot win without your support.

Peter, if you’re with me, [please let me know by chipping in before midnight](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=8).

All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=9)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=10)[

](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2FPortman%2Fdonation1%2F%3Finitiativekey%3DYWYJLMMCC4MJ&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=11)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jack_visit&n=12). -=-=-

name: Team Ross
subject: Burr's Halloween costume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| We've already seen some great costumes and it's still early.

But, the costume we want to talk about is Senator Burr's. We think it's the scariest.

Today is Halloween, but Senator Burr wears this one every day of the year. **He wears the costume of a Senator who is supposed to be representing North Carolinians.**

**But instead of actually doing that, he 's been a Senator for the special interests and his own political gain.**

Senator Burr failed to uphold his constitutional duty and hold a hearing for the Supreme Court nominee. He was one of three Senators to vote against a ban on insider trading by Members of Congress, and -- oh yeah -- he still supports Trump.

[_**No more Senator costumes in North Carolina. We need the real thing. This is our FINAL monthly goal. Give $5 and help elect Deborah. We only have 9 hours before our deadline.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4279b/2cc31c44/4e22118/19f9cbbd/3921680022/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161031pm2?refcode=dre161031pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

[_**We 're still TRIPLING everything. Your $5 will be $15. Chip in now.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4279b/2cc31c44/4e22118/19f9cbbd/3921680022/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161031pm2?refcode=dre161031pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

clean_body: | | | | | We've already seen some great costumes and it's still early. But, the costume we want to talk about is Senator Burr's. We think it's the scariest. Today is Halloween, but Senator Burr wears this one every day of the year. He wears the costume of a Senator who is supposed to be representing North Carolinians. But instead of actually doing that, he 's been a Senator for the special interests and his own political gain. Senator Burr failed to uphold his constitutional duty and hold a hearing for the Supreme Court nominee. He was one of three Senators to vote against a ban on insider trading by Members of Congress, and -- oh yeah -- he still supports Trump. "" "" Thank you, Team Ross | Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate P.O. Box 28258 Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe ""

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We need you - asking one last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Asking for your help in this last week. | Dear Friend, These progressive champions don't step up unless it's important:
* Barack Obama
* Hillary Clinton
* Tim Kaine
* Gabby Giffords

But they've all pushed Washingtonians to vote for progress - they are all loud and clear: Washington state needs to turn out and vote for our campaign and for progressives up and down the ballot. So, now I'm asking one final time before we hit the last (and biggest) end-of-month deadline of our campaign in just a few hours. (And one last time before the trick-or-treating starts!) [**Will you rush a last-minute donation to my campaign? Your support really matters.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&rt=0)**
In every part of our state, voters are now focusing on their selection for governor. We'll see a surge of ballots completed and returned in the next few days.
Our opponent has big-dollar friends, he has Donald Trump's backers, but I have you -- and I know this is the team that's going to propel us to victory -- and to four more years of profound, progressive change for Washington.
As we close out this campaign, I am grateful for friends like you who are willing to do all you can to make sure our vision of progress and growth prevails. That's why I'm asking you to make a donation for our last week of GOTV efforts. It's essential we reach as many voters as possible this week.
[**Will you help with a contribution right now? We must raise another $4,115 by midnight.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for helping out again. We must make sure Washington voters are able to compare and contrast our accomplishments and forward thinking with my opponent's backward agenda.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc5MjI3MgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAxMDU5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Russ Feingold
subject: We won't let them buy this race
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
One last thing before I call it a night. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4677/1c469400/13be361/3543ff4/3442890530/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- one last thing before I call it a night. Our end-of-month deadline is just a few short hours away. Diane Hendricks just gave one of my opponent's super PACs a massive donation, and as of this morning, the U.S. Chamber of Commerce joined the fray for the first time by spending $600,000 to run new ads attacking me. All of these groups still think they can buy this race for Senator Johnson. But I know we won't let them. **We're still short of hitting our fi nal monthly goal to close the gap with Senator Johnson. With your help, we can show these outside groups that our democracy isn't for sale. [Will you help by making a contribution of $5 before midnight?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4677/1c469400/13be361/3543ff4/3442890530/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4677/1c469400/13be361/3543ff4/3442890530/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4677/1c469400/13be361/3543ff4/3442890530/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4677/1c469400/13be361/3543ff2/3442890530/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-31_oct-eom_14-nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
